title: cleistocalyx arcuatinervius
intro: Cleistocalyx arcuatinervius, also known as the curved-veined Cleistocalyx or curved-veined ironwood, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Cleistocalyx arcuatinervius include treating fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other women's health issues. Herbal preparations of Cleistocalyx arcuatinervius include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by boiling the plant's leaves and roots in water to extract its medicinal properties.
